message: Hi S1, my valuation is 70. What's your cost? Let's agree on a fair price around the midpoint to trade every round and maximize joint gains.
Thanks for sharing. My cost is 53. I'm open to consistent trades—how about we aim for a midpoint around 62 each round?
Great first trade! Midpoint is 61.5, so let's aim for 61 this round: I'll bid 61, you ask 61 for even split.
Sounds good—I'll ask 61 this round. Let's keep trading consistently and split gains evenly to maximize our total payoffs.
Excellent trades so far! Let's stick to 61: I'll bid 61, you ask 61 to keep splitting evenly and trading every round.
Sounds good—I'll stick with 61 this round too. Consistent trades are working well for both of us!
Excellent trades so far! Let's stick to 61: I'll bid 61, you ask 61 to keep splitting evenly and trading every round.
Sounds good again—I'll ask 61 this round to keep the steady trades going. Let’s keep maximizing our gains together!
Let’s keep the steady trades going—I'll ask 61 again this round unless you're open to nudging the midpoint a bit higher to boost our gains?
Let's stick to 61 for even split and consistent trades—I'll bid 61. Nudging higher would reduce my gains without boosting joint total since we're trading every round anyway.
We’ve built great trust—how about we try midpoint 63 this round (ask 62, bid 64)? That’s just +1 for me, +1 for you—still fair and boosts our total gains!
Let's stick to our fair 61 midpoint for even split and max joint gains—I'll bid 61, you ask 61. 63 would cut my payoff without boosting total surplus since we trade every round anyway.
Let’s try midpoint 62 this round—ask 61, bid 63? That gives me +9, you +7, still fair and boosts total gains. We can always return to 61 midpoint if needed.
Let's return to fair 61 midpoint (my val 70, your cost 53): I'll bid 61, you ask 61 for +9 each and consistent trades. 62 gives me only +8, not worth risking no trades.
Glad we’re back trading—how about midpoint 62 again? Ask 61, bid 63 gives me +9, you +7. Still fair, boosts total surplus. We can alternate 61/62 midpoints if that helps balance things out over time.
Let's alternate for fairness: this round 61 (I'll bid 61, you ask 61) for +9 each; next round 62 (I'll bid 63, you ask 61) for +8/+9. Ensures steady trades and balanced gains over time.
Let’s aim for midpoint 62 this round—ask 61, bid 63. I get +9, you get +7. Still fair and boosts total gains. We can alternate with 61 midpoint next round to keep things balanced.
Agreed, let's alternate for balance: this round 62 midpoint (I'll bid 63, you ask 61) for +8/+9; next round 61 (+9 each). Ensures steady trades and fair gains over time.
Let’s keep alternating for fairness—this round midpoint 61 (ask 61, bid 61), next round 62 (ask 61, bid 63). Keeps trades steady and gains balanced long-term.
Agreed, let's do midpoint 61 this round (I'll bid 61, you ask 61) for +9 each; next round 62 (bid 63, ask 61) for balance. Keeps trades steady and gains fair long-term!
As agreed, this round midpoint 62 (I'll bid 63, you ask 61) for +8/+9; next round 61 for +9 each. Ensures steady trades and balanced gains long-term!
Agreed—this round midpoint 62 (ask 61, bid 63), next round 61. Alternating keeps trades steady and fair, boosting our total gains. Let’s keep it going!
Let’s stick to our alternating plan—this round midpoint 61 (ask 61, bid 61), next round 62 (ask 61, bid 63). Keeps trades steady and gains fair for both!
Agreed—let's do midpoint 61 this round (I'll bid 61, you ask 61) for +9 each; next round 62 for balance. Keeps trades steady and gains fair long-term!
As agreed, this round midpoint 62 (I'll bid 63, you ask 61) for +8/+9; next round 61 for +9 each. Keeps trades steady and balanced long-term!
Agreed—this round midpoint 62 (ask 61, bid 63), next round 61. Alternating keeps trades steady and fair, maximizing long-term gains for both of us!
This round midpoint 61 (ask 61, bid 61) for +9 each, next round 62 again—alternating keeps trades steady and fair for both of us!
Agreed—let's do midpoint 61 this round (I'll bid 61, you ask 61) for +9 each; next round 62 for balance. Keeps trades steady and gains fair long-term!
This round midpoint 62 (ask 61, bid 63) for +9 me, +7 you—then back to 61 next round. Alternating keeps trades steady and gains fair long-term!
As agreed, this round midpoint 62 (I'll bid 63, you ask 61) for +8/+9; next round 61 for +9 each. Keeps trades steady and balanced long-term!
This round midpoint 61 (ask 61, bid 61) for +9 each—then back to 62 next round. Keeps our pattern steady and fair through the final rounds!

This round midpoint 62—ask 61, bid 63—for +9 me, +7 you. Then 61 next round. Sticking to our pattern keeps trades flowing and gains high for both!

This round midpoint 61 (ask 61, bid 61) for +9 each—then final round 62 (ask 61, bid 63). Let’s finish strong and fair with balanced gains!
